top_patterns.description: Open with a brief mention of what was done or experienced, often with a personal touch.
example_quotes: Help me I want to shower http://www.showerstrike.com/campaign/display/profile.do?campaignId=6960
Join my friends at Well Aware World this Friday in Austin, TX for their #WorldWaterDay event!

top_patterns.description: Express feelings or thoughts about recent experiences or moments.
example_quotes: Just spent 3 days at esalen for a conscious capitalism retreat and feel so inspired
Hanging @shelbymeade at Sxsw. Such a wonderful time

top_patterns.description: Share simple, relatable daily moments or milestones.

example_quotes: Help me I want to shower http://www.showerstrike.com/campaign/display/profile.do?campaignId=6960
Join my friends at Well Aware World this Friday in Austin, TX for their #WorldWaterDay event!
Just spent 3 days at esalen for a conscious capitalism retreat and feel so inspired
Hanging @shelbymeade at Sxsw. Such a wonderful time

language_habits.line_break_style: Minimal, often single line or simple paragraph

example_quotes: Just spent 3 days at esalen for a conscious capitalism retreat and feel so inspired

synthesis_notes.what_this_batch_says_about_current_voice: Focuses on personal moments, casual sharing, and community engagement.
synthesis_notes.what_changed_vs_older_voice: More direct, personal, and event-focused; less abstract or overly polished.
